concerns.text: The plan selects 'https://huggingface.co/datasets/Lostkyd/PDF_Instruct/...' as the primary source for the LOST dataset. This dataset contains PDF instruction pairs, not social media interactions (posts/replies) with timestamps required by FR-001 and the hypothesis. The 'Raiders-Of-The-Lost-Kek' link is also inappropriate (meme data). The plan cites a dataset that does not contain the necessary modalities (social interaction text, timestamps) to compute volatility or self-esteem proxies, rendering the analysis impossible.
